data.html_notes: <body>Implementation card. Changes to the Rumble App Node API and the Rumble Promo Worker to support multiple configurable campaigns and a reusable codebase. Depends on the companion planning card.</body>
data.name: Implement: Rumble App Node API + Promo Worker refactor for configurable multi-campaign reusable code
data.notes: Implementation card. Changes to the Rumble App Node API and the Rumble Promo Worker to support multiple configurable campaigns and a reusable codebase. Depends on the companion planning card.
